privileged_info_summary: Completed PI audit for openvsp_env openvsp_shuttle_stack_integration task by confirming that the task operates on a proxy model (NASA eCRM-001) while the STS integration specifications are synthetically generated via setup_task.sh. Verified that the expected output paths and required target dimensions for the ET (47.0m) and SRB (45.4m) explicitly match the generated instructions in 'sts_stack_spec.txt' and the verifier.py geometric bounds.
